translations.pt: Minha esposa chega daqui a pouco.
translations.hi: मेरी पत्नी जल्द ही आ रही है.
translations.el: Η γυναίκα μου έρχεται σε λίγο.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing with the feminine singular noun 'Ehefrau' in nominative; marks the subject's possessor.
Common noun, feminine singular; syntactic subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; main predicate indicating arrival.
Temporal adverb meaning 'soon/shortly'; modifies the verb phrase.

sentences.target: Ich rufe meine Ehefrau später an.

translations.de: Ich rufe meine Ehefrau später an.
translations.en: I will call my wife later.
translations.es: Voy a llamar a mi esposa más tarde.
translations.fr: Je vais appeler ma femme plus tard.
translations.zh-Hans: 我等会儿给我妻子打电话。
translations.pt: Vou ligar para minha esposa mais tarde.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ gọi cho vợ tôi sau.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी पत्नी को बाद में फोन करूँगा.
translations.el: Θα καλέσω τη γυναίκα μου αργότερα.
translations.id: Nanti saya akan menelepon istri saya.
translations.ro: O sun pe soția mea mai târziu.
translations.da: Jeg ringer til min kone senere.
translations.ja: あとで妻に電話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present; main verb in a separable construction with 'an' forming 'anrufen' (to phone).
Possessive determiner agreeing with feminine singular noun 'Ehefrau' in accusative; marks the direct object.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object (accusative) of 'rufe'.
Temporal adverb indicating a later time; modifies the verb phrase.
Separable verb particle completing the compound verb 'anrufen' with 'rufe'; contributes the 'phone' meaning.

sentences.target: Seine Ehefrau arbeitet heute im Café.

translations.de: Seine Ehefrau arbeitet heute im Café.
translations.en: His wife is working at the café today.
translations.es: Su esposa trabaja hoy en la cafetería.
translations.fr: Sa femme travaille au café aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Sua moglie lavora oggi al bar.
translations.zh-Hans: 他妻子今天在咖啡馆上班。
translations.yue: 佢太太今日喺咖啡店做嘢。
translations.ru: Его жена сегодня работает в кафе.
translations.pt: A esposa dele trabalha hoje na cafeteria.
translations.vi: Vợ anh ấy làm việc ở quán cà phê hôm nay.
translations.nl: Zijn vrouw werkt vandaag in het café.
translations.uk: Його дружина сьогодні працює в кафе.
translations.hu: A felesége ma a kávézóban dolgozik.
translations.hi: उसकी पत्नी आज कैफ़े में काम कर रही है.
translations.pl: Jego żona dziś pracuje w kawiarni.
translations.el: Η γυναίκα του δουλεύει σήμερα στην καφετέρια.
translations.nb: Kona hans jobber på kafé i dag.
translations.id: Istrinya bekerja di kafe hari ini.
translations.sv: Hans fru jobbar på kafé i dag.
translations.ro: Soția lui lucrează azi la cafenea.
translations.cs: Jeho manželka dnes pracuje v kavárně.
translations.da: Hans kone arbejder på café i dag.
translations.ja: 彼の妻は今日カフェで働いています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing with feminine singular noun 'Ehefrau' in nominative; marks the subject's possessor.
Common noun, feminine singular; syntactic subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; main predicate indicating employment/activity.
Temporal adverb specifying the day; modifies the verb.
Preposition contracted with the article ('in dem'); introduces a dative prepositional phrase of location.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'im', indicating the place of work.

sentences.target: Er wartet auf seine Ehefrau vor dem Kino.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ ˈvaʁtət aʊ̯f ˈzaɪ̯nə ˈeːəˌfʁaʊ̯ foːɐ̯ deːm ˈkiːno/

translations.de: Er wartet auf seine Ehefrau vor dem Kino.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ ˈvaʁtət aʊ̯f ˈzaɪ̯nə ˈeːəˌfʁaʊ̯ foːɐ̯ deːm ˈkiːno/
translations.en: He is waiting for his wife in front of the cinema.
translations.es: Él espera a su esposa frente al cine.
translations.fr: Il attend sa femme devant le cinéma.
translations.it: Lui aspetta sua moglie davanti al cinema.
translations.ko: 그는 영화관 앞에서 아내를 기다리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他在电影院门口等他妻子。
translations.yue: 佢喺戲院門口等緊佢太太。
translations.ru: Он ждёт свою жену у кинотеатра.
translations.pt: Ele espera a esposa dele em frente ao cinema.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đang đợi vợ trước rạp chiếu phim.
translations.nl: Hij wacht op zijn vrouw voor de bioscoop.
translations.uk: Він чекає на свою дружину перед кінотеатром.
translations.hu: A feleségére vár a mozi előtt.
translations.hi: वह सिनेमा के बाहर अपनी पत्नी का इंतज़ार कर रहा है.
translations.pl: On czeka na swoją żonę przed kinem.
translations.el: Αυτός περιμένει τη γυναίκα του μπροστά από τον κινηματογράφο.
translations.nb: Han venter på kona si foran kinoen.
translations.id: Dia menunggu istrinya di depan bioskop.
translations.sv: Han väntar på sin fru utanför biografen.
translations.ro: El își așteaptă soția în fața cinematografului.
translations.cs: Čeká na svou manželku před kinem.
translations.da: Han venter på sin kone foran biografen.
translations.ja: 彼は映画館の前で妻を待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; main predicate.
Preposition used with 'warten' to mean 'wait for'; selects accusative for its object.
Possessive determiner agreeing with feminine singular noun 'Ehefrau' in accusative; determiner of the prepositional object.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'auf' (the person being waited for).
Preposition introducing a locative phrase; selects dative.
Definite article, dative singular neuter; agrees with 'Kino' as object of 'vor'.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'vor', indicating location.
